priority_vocabulary.P3: Deferred improvement or optional compatibility refinement.

status_advancement_rule: Only the owner repository can justify accepted or landed status. The center may queue and request; it may not self-promote owner-local truth.

status_vocabulary.accepted: The owner repository has accepted scope in an owner-local issue, document, branch, or equivalent receipt.
status_vocabulary.blocked: The request cannot advance until an explicit blocker is resolved.
status_vocabulary.landed: The owner repository has landed the requested surface and the required proof or receipt is linked.
status_vocabulary.queued: The center has identified an owner-local slice, but no full request packet is ready yet.
status_vocabulary.requested: A center-side request packet exists and may be handed to the owner repository; this is not owner acceptance.
status_vocabulary.retired: The request is intentionally kept as historical context and must not be treated as active.
status_vocabulary.superseded: The request has been replaced by another request ID and must point to that successor.
